Plan:
  + host.docker-daemon1.docker.apt.repository["docker-official"]
    manage docker official apt repository
    source: ../../../examples/v2-docker-daemon.dbf.hcl:12:host.docker-daemon1.docker
    + content
      @@ -1,0 +1,6 @@
      + Types: deb
      + URIs: https://download.docker.com/linux/debian
      + Suites: trixie
      + Components: stable
      + Architectures: amd64
      + Signed-By: /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "root"
    + mode: "0644"
    + name: "docker-official"
    + owner: "root"
    + path: "/etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker_official.sources"

      +     "https://mirror.example.com"
      +   ]

    + name: "docker"

    + unit: "docker.service"
  ! host.docker-daemon1.apt.cache_refresh
    refresh apt package cache
    triggered_by: host.docker-daemon1.docker.apt.signing_key["docker-official"], host.docker-daemon1.docker.apt.repository["docker-official"]
  ! host.docker-daemon1.docker.daemon.restart
    restart docker service
    triggered_by: host.docker-daemon1.docker.daemon.file["/etc/docker/daemon.json"]
